posts.name: Fundraisly
posts.tagline: AI fundraising agent that finds investors and books meetings
posts.description: Fundraisly: ultimate AI agent for fundraising. It analyzes 300K+ investors and millions of deals, identifies the relevant ones actively investing in your space, maps warm paths to them from your own network, then covers the rest with targeted cold outreach. The result: 20-40 qualified investor meetings. Built by founders who raised over $1B.

posts.name: Vokal
posts.tagline: A collaboration space for 10x teammates with their Al agents
posts.description: Your Codex and my Codex can’t talk, so we play human telephone in Slack: copy prompts, paste summaries, ask for reviews, and lose the run. Vokal brings 10x teammates and their agents into one live workspace in minutes, whether they run local Codex, Claude Code, or Hermes — or in the cloud. Name your agents, give them roles, access, and memory, and work will happen in a shared collaboration space instead of through copy-paste handoffs.

posts.name: Gigacatalyst
posts.tagline: Give your Sales and CS teams engineering superpowers
posts.description: Gigacatalyst.com's AI builder learns your APIs and embeds in your product, so your sales and CS teams can build missing features that customers need to your platform. When your software adapts to every customer's workflow, they utilize your software more, retain for longer, and expand quicker, because they get most custom implementation for their exact usecase.

posts.name: Co-Invest
posts.tagline: Trade 500+ markets directly from ChatGPT & Claude
posts.description: Co-Invest by Liquid lets you research and place real trades inside ChatGPT or Claude. Access 500+ markets across crypto, equities, FX, commodities, and prediction markets—24/7. Fund in-chat, use on-chain signals (wallet activity, positioning, funding, order flow), and execute in plain language with stops/targets. Your AI also handles support with full context.

posts.name: Brief
posts.tagline: Navigate your agents to product-market fit
posts.description: AI agents can ship quickly, but without the right product context, they're often flying blind. Brief gives product teams a living source of truth that captures decisions, preserves product intent, and serves relevant context to humans and agents through chat, Slack, CLI, and MCP. It keeps strategy, decisions, and execution connected from vision to impact.

posts.name: Paste MCP & AI Tools
posts.tagline: Infinite clipboard for Claude, Codex and other AI tools
posts.description: Privacy-first, lightning fast, searchable, and avaialbe across all devices. Save snippets, sync securely, and boost productivity with smart shortcuts and instant paste history.

posts.name: PawPause
posts.tagline: Lock your keyboard and prevent cats from causing chaos
posts.description: A tiny macOS menu bar app that detects when your cat is on the keyboard and pauses input system-wide. 100% on-device. Open source. Free.

posts.name: Enshittifier
posts.tagline: Chrome extension that replaces "AI" with 💩
posts.description: The Mac app started as a dumb question: can you use font ligatures to turn AI into 💩? Turns out yes. Ironically, I used AI to figure out how. The Chrome extension came after — web fonts don't always cooperate. So mostly this is me poking fun. It's also a small nudge to be a little more mindful of the din around AI. Starting, apparently, with your font files.

posts.name: Rodeo by TwelveLabs
posts.tagline: Describe your shot. Rodeo builds your first cut.
posts.description: Rodeo by TwelveLabs is the AI video intelligence platform for creators and teams who produce at scale. Stop wasting hours scrubbing footage. Go from raw clips to a first cut in minutes using plain language. It's structured creation, not manual review. Unlike transcript-first tools, Rodeo's multimodal AI understands visuals, audio, speech, and text simultaneously, making it perfect for visual-first content. Your video library is now instantly queryable for humans and agents.

posts.name: choclift
posts.tagline: Use iPhone to open apps, Apple Shortcuts and websites on Mac
posts.description: Think beyond the keyboard, trackpad, and mouse: choclift is the third interface for interacting with your Mac. It turns your iPhone into a customizable chocolate bar that lets you instantly switch between favorite and recent Mac apps, trigger Apple Shortcuts without any detours, and use website bookmarks like never before. With a strong focus on product design and user experience, we're just getting started on building the quickest and sweetest way to work with your Mac.

posts.name: Branda
posts.tagline: A fun new way to create & manage brands.
posts.description: Branda turns a name and idea into a complete brand identity in minutes: strategy, logo, palette, type, and full brand kit. Start from scratch or import existing assets. ✨ 200 free credits on signup ✨ Let AI lead with Lucky, or guide strategy, sketches, and vector concepts yourself. Use visual prompts to keep every generation consistent, extract elements, vectorize to SVG, upscale, export, and share a public showcase.

posts.name: GlowPulse
posts.tagline: Your Mac's camera is now a heart-rate sensor
posts.description: GlowPulse measures your heart rate from your Mac's built-in camera using rPPG – no watch, no chest strap, no wearable. Lives in the menu bar with live BPM, sparkline, and color-coded zones. 100% on-device. Camera frames are processed in memory and discarded. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Pomodoro focus with live HR chart. Breathing sessions with real-time HRV. 30-second stress check. $2.99 once. macOS 13+.

posts.name: Knock agent for Slack
posts.tagline: Build, manage, and ship customer messaging from Slack
posts.description: Knock is the agent-led customer engagement platform for managing all the messages your users receive across channels. After connecting Knock to Slack, simply tag @Knock in any channel, describe what you want, and let the agent work in the background to build campaigns, draft messaging, and update lifecycle workflows. The agent gathers the context from your account, posts progress updates in the thread as it works, and provides a link to the resource when it's ready to review.

posts.name: Trovelo
posts.tagline: Plan and track your trips privately
posts.description: Trovelo is a private trip planner for iPhone and Mac — no accounts, no servers, no subscription. Built by a solo traveler with 40+ countries of experience frustrated with every existing app. Plan day by day with smart cards, type naturally and the app figures it out, track expenses in dual currency, optimize your route, and sync privately via iCloud. One-time $6.99 Pro. Yours forever.

posts.name: Kompassify 2.0
posts.tagline: User onboarding now with an AI copilot
posts.description: We built Kompassify so teams could onboard users without touching code. 6 years later, it's grown into a full adoption platform shaped by your feedback: 🗺️ Product Tours ✅ Onboarding Checklists 🔔 Notifications Widget 📋 In-app Surveys 📊 Product Analytics 🤖 AI copilot to fix adoption 👋 Welcome Screens 🌍 Multi-language support ✂️ Segmentation One snippet. No-Coding required. Free plan no credit card required. 🚀

posts.name: Moxie Docs
posts.tagline: Living docs + MCP context for your GitHub repos
posts.description: Moxie Docs indexes your GitHub repo once, then puts that understanding where the work happens: repo context inside your AI agents over MCP, a searchable docs workspace, and PR checks that keep documentation honest.

posts.name: ConnectWizard
posts.tagline: Unlock hidden App Store Connect analytics
posts.description: App Store Connect only shows a fraction of the data Apple actually collects about your app. ConnectWizard unlocks all 100+ report types — both App Store data and on-device data from your users. Get started with pre-defined stats and pin the ones that matter to you, or dig into the raw data and build your own presets. If your app has a larger user base, you also get detailed framework usage data like how long Live Activities are used or which Shortcuts run or fail.

posts.name: Mirowl
posts.tagline: Search all your screenshots via a local OCR-powered AI
posts.description: A frictionless, local-first Mac app to index and search all your screenshots and image assets. Built with Rust/Tauri for zero footprint and powered by native macOS Vision for 10x OCR accuracy. Optional cloud, no tracking—just pure utility.

posts.name: Galleroo
posts.tagline: Turn your Google Drive into a stunning client gallery
posts.description: Galleroo turns any Google Drive folder into a beautiful, password-protected client gallery in under 60 seconds. No re-uploading, no account needed for clients, and your photos never leave your Drive.

posts.name: Overline
posts.tagline: Real-time AI captions and translation for any browser video
posts.description: Overline is a Chrome extension that adds real-time AI captions and live translation on top of any browser video, no subtitles needed, no tab switching. Works on YouTube, Netflix, Twitch, Zoom, or any tab. Sub-second latency. Translation is optional and per-session. No page injection, no file uploads, pure live audio streaming.

posts.name: findloc.ai
posts.tagline: Make your business citable by ChatGPT, Claude & Perplexity
posts.description: Customers ask AI "best dentist near me" — but most local businesses are invisible to ChatGPT. findloc.ai gives you a free AI-visible mini-page with schema, FAQ & structured data so ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity and Google AI can actually cite you.

posts.name: RingDisk
posts.tagline: Brighten your video calls with different toned ring lights
posts.description: Say goodbye to dark, grainy webcams and unflattering shadows. RingDisk creates a beautiful, customizable glowing border around your screen that illuminates your face with a perfect studio glow. Whether you are on Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, Skype, or recording self-tapes, RingDisk ensures you always look professional and well-lit. Designed specifically for macOS, RingDisk is lightweight, highly customizable, and extremely easy to use.

makers.name: Zhanna Jussipova
makers.headline: Founder of "KZ AI" company in KZ

posts.name: Sortail
posts.tagline: Self-learning one-click inbox cleanup for Apple Mail
posts.description: A tiny toolbar that floats above Apple Mail and sorts your inbox in one click — a single message, the whole thread, or every email from that sender, off to a folder, the archive, or the trash. It quietly learns where things usually go and starts suggesting the right folder for you.

posts.name: HumToBeats
posts.tagline: Turn humming into AI-generated beats
posts.description: Turn a hummed melody and tapped rhythm into an EDM beat, drop, or demo track with AI. Hum, tap, generate, and remix in one browser workflow.

posts.name: MartinLoop
posts.tagline: Control AI coding agents with limits, proof, + run receipts
posts.description: MartinLoop is the control plane for autonomous AI coding agents. Today, it wraps Claude, Codex, OpenCode, and other agents with spend limits, proof checks, safety rules, rollback, and run receipts. The bigger build turns that into a full agent control plane: dashboards, HeadlessOS-style execution, team oversight, cost visibility, and a trusted record of what every agent did, why it kept going, and why it stopped. Unbounded AI agents are expensive. Fix that. Run it. Prove it. Stop it

posts.name: Gusto Cofounder
posts.tagline: If Gusto, OpenClaw, and Claude Cowork had a baby...
posts.description: Gusto Cofounder automates your entire small business. You describe your business processes and save them as Automations, which run on any schedule you want. Automations can connect to your systems outside of Gusto, such as Notion, Google Sheets, Quickbooks, or any MCP server you want. Like OpenClaw, you chat with Gusto Cofounder over SMS or Slack. Automations give you updates over SMS, and you can reply back. And of course, it comes with many Gusto capabilities across Payroll, Time and HR.

posts.name: Rhyme
posts.tagline: Better conversations online. Built for people.
posts.description: A more intentional social media. Organized around the things you love, not the people shouting loudest. Rhyme organizes conversation by topic, not by an algorithmic feed. It weighs contributions by judgment, not by who shouted loudest. It eliminates volunteer moderation bias and conversation fragmentation.

posts.name: PufferPages
posts.tagline: The visual journal that turns your days into comics
posts.description: PufferPages is a visual journal that draws your days. Speak or type just 1-3 moments and it turns them into a comic page that looks like you, plus your people and pets, in any of 8 hand-tuned styles, from Pop and Anime to Watercolor and Painted 2.5D. Every 7 days binds into a printable issue, and a year of tiny moments becomes a full comic book of your life. 5 languages. First comic free, no card, no subscription.

posts.name: Superlist MCP
posts.tagline: The task layer for your AI agents
posts.description: Connect Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or any MCP-compatible AI agent directly to Superlist. Create tasks, set due dates, manage lists, and automate recurring routines using plain-language prompts — no copy-paste required.

posts.name: Deckly
posts.tagline: Turn raw product usage data into a revenue driving deck
posts.description: Customer Success Managers spend 4-5 hours building a single QBR deck. RetainSure's QBR Generator cuts that to 4 minutes. Paste in your customer context, and get a personalised, presentation-ready deck instantly. No templates or manual work needed.

posts.name: Globe Thrivers Beta
posts.tagline: Save travel inspo in one place and turn it into trips
posts.description: Globe Thrivers helps travelers turn scattered travel inspiration into organized, bookable trips. Instead of planning across saved Reels, notes, spreadsheets, and group chats, users can save travel inspiration from TikTok, Instagram, and creator recommendations into one place and use AI to organize it into editable itineraries. Travelers can remix creator-curated trips, and support creators when they book - turning travel planning from chaotic into social, structured, and actionable.

posts.name: GhostPhone
posts.tagline: Number Generator for verification codes, onboarding and QA
posts.description: GhostPhone by KrispCall gives teams browser-based virtual numbers for QA testing, onboarding, account verification, and secure operations. Generate numbers across global regions, receive verification codes in a built-in inbox, and manage workflows without extra SIM cards or devices. Built for legitimate business use by product, ops, and growth teams.

posts.name: Yogakosh
posts.tagline: Zero decisions, audio-first yoga. Just press play.
posts.description: Audio-first yoga for people who want to practice, not browse. A new sequence is ready every day — no searching, no decisions. Just press start. Pick your time, focus, and energy style. A custom flow builds in seconds. Audio guidance with modifications means you rarely look at the screen. Illustrated poses in English and Sanskrit. Apple Sign-In only. Zero tracking. Free to start: 4 sequences + 3 premium credits.

posts.name: Berta Systems
posts.tagline: Get your mechanical parts designed and manufactured in days
posts.description: For decades, hardware development has been slowing down. You may have felt it: delayed launches, designs sent back for rework to ensure manufacturability, and all the stress of managing outsourced shops. Berta changes that. Our AI designs parts that actually meet your specs and pass manufacturability checks. Then we make and ship your first prototype within 72 hours of your deposit, from the US or EU, whichever is closer. Cut your hardware development from years to less than 3 months.

makers.name: Páll Guðbrandsson
makers.headline: Automating Engineers out of Admin Tasks

posts.name: Tweetary
posts.tagline: You ship. We market it on X. On autopilot
posts.description: Switching from building to marketing again and again is frustrating Every time you stop coding to think about what to post, you lose momentum That's why I built Tweetary Instead of asking you to create content from scratch, Tweetary turns the work you're already doing into content

posts.name: Leadomator
posts.tagline: Unlimited leads 24/7.
posts.description: Collect business leads for cold email and cold contact. Enter your website, AI suggests keywords and locations, you collect verified emails and phones from 150+ countries.

posts.name: Cogvert Scout
posts.tagline: AI visibility with a built in action plan.
posts.description: Cogvert Scout is an AI visibility tool that goes beyond dashboards. It tracks how often your brand shows up in ChatGPT, Gemini and Perplexity, then turns every scan into a prioritized action list across content, schema and technical fixes. Unlike heavy SEO suites or AI trackers, Scout is built as a weekly habit for small teams and agencies, so you can track, diagnose, fix and retest AI visibility in 15 minutes a week.

posts.name: Vero+
posts.tagline: A money habit app that rewards you for saving
posts.description: Vero isn't a budgeting app - we're a money habit app. Instead of simply showing users where their money goes, our AI identifies spending patterns, creates personalised saving challenges, and rewards progress with tokens. Users build streaks, earn XP, compete with friends, and redeem rewards from brands they love to reduce living costs or enjoy treats they'd otherwise cut back on. Restriction alone isn't sustainable. That's why we help people enjoy life not despite saving, but because of it.

posts.name: ZeroSev — Your Oncall copilot
posts.tagline: By the time you are paged, the root cause is ready!
posts.description: Your always-on AI oncall engineer. The moment an alert fires, ZeroSev investigates your logs, metrics, traces and deploys, builds a cited root-cause hypothesis, and drafts the fix — so your first human minute is reviewing, not reading dashboards.

posts.name: ClaraConverts
posts.tagline: 24/7 website conversion employee for any business
posts.description: Clara converts website traffic into leads, bookings, and customers through voice chat conversations. Unlike traditional chatbots, Clara adapts to each website's goals, learns the business, answers visitor questions, and actively steers visitors toward conversion actions.

makers.name: Volker Arndt
makers.headline: Making YOU the HERO of your own STORY.

posts.name: Laviya
posts.tagline: Beyond project management. Built for productivity
posts.description: Laviya goes beyond traditional PM tools by combining task management, effort tracking, reporting, and AI Orchestration in one workspace. Teams can plan work, track performance, document knowledge, and run AI-powered workflows with local agents. Its strong reporting layer gives leaders clear visibility into productivity, workload, and execution quality.

posts.name: Dreamshelf
posts.tagline: Browse, Save, Organise & Use webpages as one workflow.
posts.description: Most productivity tools treat browsing, saving, organizing, and using information as separate problems but they're not. They're one workflow and the handoffs between tools are where everything gets lost. Dreamshelf unifies the entire journey: browse distraction-free, save pages and notes with intent, organize them into collections in a personal shelf, and actually use your bookmarks through google calendar schedules, shelf sharing, and paste saved bookmarks on any text box with a right click.

posts.name: ClaraConverts
posts.tagline: 24/7 website conversion employee for any business
posts.description: Clara converts website traffic into leads, bookings, and customers through voice chat conversations. Unlike traditional chatbots, Clara adapts to each website's goals, learns the business, answers visitor questions, and actively steers visitors toward conversion actions.

makers.name: Volker Arndt
makers.headline: Making YOU the HERO of your own STORY.

posts.name: Churnkey SDK
posts.tagline: An open-source cancel flow for React
posts.description: An open-source cancel flow for React. Survey, offers, feedback, and confirmation in one component. Optionally connects to Churnkey for analytics, A/B testing, and AI retention features.

posts.name: PromptVault
posts.tagline: Ship prompt changes without touching your codebase
posts.description: If you're building an LLM app, your prompts are constantly changing - and every change shouldn't require a PR, CI run, and a full redeploy. PromptVault is a prompt management tool for AI builders. Edit prompts live in production, version every change, and roll back in one click. Connect Once → Draft → Live - without touching your codebase. Built for indie developers, AI founders, and product teams shipping LLM features.

posts.name: OpenClaw Business
posts.tagline: What would you hire 4 people to do? This does it for €129/mo
posts.description: OpenClaw Business replaces your lead qualification, reporting, CRM, and social media management with four AI agents running 24/7 on your own private EU server. No shared cloud. No extra hires. Powered by Mistral (EU), Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, or DeepSeek — your choice. Includes Twenty CRM and Postiz at no extra cost. GDPR-compliant. First month free — code UL76U7DCCU. From €129/mo.

posts.name: Create UI
posts.tagline: World's largest design & code ecosystem.
posts.description: Most UI kits are either a Figma file or a code library. Create UI is both, perfectly in sync: a full Figma design system plus an installable React + Tailwind + Radix UI library that share the same tokens, components, and variants. 40+ components, 12,000+ variants, 700+ design tokens. Design and ship from one source instead of rebuilding UI every time. Free library out now. Pro in pre-sale, 70% off, lifetime access.

posts.name: SelfMeditate
posts.tagline: No guides. Just your practice.
posts.description: Most meditation apps are audio libraries. You press play, follow a voice, and come back tomorrow to be guided again. We built SelfMeditate for people who want to sit with themselves. No guided meditations. No voices. Just a timer, interval bells, ambient sounds, a presence tracker, a private journal with voice notes and drawings, and insights into your own practice patterns. Everything stays on your device. No account. No ads. Own your practice.

posts.name: The Thinking Builder
posts.tagline: A book of common sense in the era of thinking machines.
posts.description: Thinking machines are making it easier to make software, but it's the builder behind the keyboard who makes the difference. Good designers, engineers, and founders do things others don't. They are thinking builders who see the craft from a different angle. This book holds 60 letters for the builders who do not want to be average. Not a tutorial. Just the common sense every creator needs. A light philosophy book about software.

posts.name: Filebase
posts.tagline: Fast S3-Compatible Object Storage with Free Egress
posts.description: Filebase Object Storage is fast S3-compatible storage for teams that need predictable pricing, free egress, and high-performance data access. Store data at $15/TB with a built-in CDN, bare metal infrastructure, and built-in object verification.

posts.name: Blastifi
posts.tagline: WhatsApp killed free Broadcast. We brought it back.
posts.description: WhatsApp moved free Broadcast behind a paid API costing $500/month. Millions of small businesses lost their #1 marketing tool overnight. We built Blastifi as the direct response. Send personalized WhatsApp broadcasts to your entire customer list — no API, no Meta approval, no per-message fees. Works with your existing number in 2 minutes. Free plan available. Paid plans start at $2/month. Built in Jordan for small businesses worldwide 🇯🇴

posts.name: Breez
posts.tagline: Find logistics providers. Post needs. Move faster.
posts.description: Logistics runs the world. But finding the right trucking company, warehouse space, pallets or labor still happens over the phone, through WhatsApp groups and word of mouth. Breez fixes that. One free platform where logistics buyers and providers connect. Browse and post listings on the Marketplace. Find verified providers across trucking, warehousing, freight, drayage, labor and equipment. Post a need and get offers fast. Built by someone who actually lived this problem — 5 years in logistics

posts.name: Worldculator
posts.tagline: 250+ free calculators for finance, health, math & more
posts.description: Worldculator is a free, no signup calculator library covering finance, health, math, science, construction, social media and more soon... Every tool gives instant results with clear explanations, no ads interrupting your calculation, no sign up required. Whether you need your mortgage payment, drink drive limit, shed base materials, or what your Instagram is worth to brands, and it's all here. 250+ calculators and growing.

posts.name: Simple Allergy Alert
posts.tagline: Create food allergy cards in 100+ languages + emergency card
posts.description: Travelling with food allergies means constant guesswork. Google Translate gets allergen terms wrong. Pre-printed cards only cover one language. Simple Allergy Alert generates a food allergy card in 100+ languages instantly. Tap your allergens, pick a language, show the card. The emergency card shows the local emergency number for whichever country you're in - in the local language. Permanently free. Also: offline saved cards, home screen widget, audio playback.

posts.name: Decomp.ai — Agent Cost Optimisation
posts.tagline: Cut LLM costs. Free audit, pay only if it works.
posts.description: Every AI app has the same silent problem: you're paying 3–5× more than you need to for LLM calls. Decomp.ai audits your pipeline in 60 seconds — finds which calls can be replaced (sentiment checks, formatting, repeated queries) and gives you before/after code diffs plus one-click prompts to paste into Cursor or Claude Code. Free scan. Pay 5% of your estimated monthly saving to unlock fixes (S$4.99–S$9.99 max). Zero if we find nothing. 🎉 Use DECOMPLAUNCH — free during launch week.

posts.name: ChirpBack
posts.tagline: Listen to users. Ship what matters. Close the loop
posts.description: You collect feedback in one tool, surveys in another, changelogs somewhere else — and by the time you ship, you've lost track of who asked for what. ChirpBack brings feedback, surveys, announcements, and analytics into one platform. Aero, our AI assistant, drafts replies, summarizes signals, and handles the busywork. When you ship, we notify the exact users who asked — automatically. No more juggling tabs. Close the loop.

posts.name: Teamside
posts.tagline: Small team chat and voice rooms on European servers
posts.description: Teamside is an installable web app for private teams, gaming groups, and small communities that need fast text chat, voice rooms, secure invites, and real-time presence without the weight of a traditional desktop client. It starts with lightweight WebRTC peer-to-peer voice for small rooms, then can migrate to SFU server mode when more reliability is needed. Built as a PWA, Teamside feels close to a native PC app while staying easy to open, share, and update We are on European servers exclusively

posts.name: Careerboat.ai
posts.tagline: AI-powered career platform for jobseekers and students.
posts.description: Careerboat.ai helps students and early career professionals land jobs faster with AI-powered tools. Build an ATS optimized resume, practice interviews with AI feedback, track all your applications in one place, and research companies using real interview experiences from other candidates. Built for freshers and students, not seasoned executives. All core features are free.

posts.name: Is My Idea Valid? Startup Idea Validator

posts.description: Type your startup idea and instantly search Reddit, Google, YouTube, Product Hunt & more for real demand signals. Follow expert checklists, uncover pain points, and get a brutal 0–100 validation score before you waste months building.

posts.name: PlateLens
posts.tagline: The best and most accurate AI Calorie Counter app.
posts.description: PlateLens is the best overall calorie counter in the market. It is not only easiest but also the most accurate calorie counter. Snap a photo for instant nutrition analysis, or log it manually — whatever you prefer. You also get a built-in AI Nutrition Coach that helps you order at restaurants, adjusts your goals as you go, and is there for whatever you need. And the Free plan never expires: 3 AI photo scans a day plus unlimited manual logging — no credit card required.

posts.name: Careerboat.ai
posts.tagline: AI-powered career platform for jobseekers and students.
posts.description: Careerboat.ai helps students and early career professionals land jobs faster with AI-powered tools. Build an ATS optimized resume, practice interviews with AI feedback, track all your applications in one place, and research companies using real interview experiences from other candidates. Built for freshers and students, not seasoned executives. All core features are free.

posts.name: Pushary
posts.tagline: Control panel for AI agents
posts.description: You start a Cursor task, check Twitter, come back 40 minutes later. Your agent finished 35 minutes ago. Pushary sends push notifications to your phone when any AI agent completes, fails, or needs approval. Approve commands from your lock screen. One npx command to set up. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, Hermes, Lovable, and any MCP agent.

posts.name: WEBDEVPACK
posts.tagline: Everyday tools for web creators
posts.description: WEBDEVPACK is a collection of free, easy-to-use web-based tools designed to simplify everyday tasks in web development, web design, and working online.

posts.name: WorldRunner
posts.tagline: Curated Running Routes & Clubs for Everyone
posts.description: Unlike traditional running apps, WorldRunner is built for those who crave exploration and local connection. Instead of guessing where to go based on an avalanche of possibilities, we deliver curated, scenic routes shaped by local athletes and travelers insights. We go further with social integration: get instant access to the best local running and cycling clubs in 50+ cities as well as their calendar without spending hours doing the research yourself.

makers.name: Jérôme
makers.headline: Building a curated routes running app

posts.name: Plumber Triage
posts.tagline: AI powered Whatsapp tool for plumbers.
posts.description: Plumber Triage is an AI‑powered lead management tool built specifically for plumbers and service contractors. Customers submit a quick online form describing their issue, and the system instantly analyzes the request, assigns an urgency score, and identifies the tools or materials likely needed. The results are delivered straight to the plumber’s WhatsApp.

posts.name: Voltius
posts.tagline: A lightning-fast, modern, local-first SSH/SFTP/Serial client
posts.description: Voltius is a free, open-source SSH client alternative to Termius, built with privacy first. Built with Rust + Tauri Key features: 🔄 1-Click Import/Export: Switch instantly from Termius, MobaXterm & SecureCRT. 🔐 Gist Sync: E2EE sync across devices using your own private GitHub Gist. 100% local encryption 📁 SFTP & Split Panes: Drag-and-drop file transfers + broadcast inputs. 🐳 Manage containers & view live host system stats. And Much more... (check out Website and GitHub)

posts.name: Play2Practice
posts.tagline: Turn any topic or PDF into interactive quiz games
posts.description: Play2Practice transforms any topic or PDF into interactive quiz games in seconds. Instead of passively reading notes, you can actively learn by playing. Simply upload a PDF or enter a topic, and AI generates engaging quiz experiences based on the content. Whether you're studying for exams, learning a new subject, or practicing important concepts, Play2Practice helps make learning more interactive and memorable.

posts.name: Zentria Flow
posts.tagline: Know your true import cost before you place an order
posts.description: E-commerce importers lose thousands to unexpected tariff bills — especially now with US-China tariffs at 145%. Zentria Flow calculates your complete landed cost in 10 seconds: duties, tariffs, VAT, freight, and insurance. Then audits your shipment documents for compliance errors before they become expensive customs problems. Free to start. 3 calculations/day, no account needed. Covers US, UK, EU and 180+ countries.

posts.name: JustEnv
posts.tagline: Your environment variables, finally in one safe place
posts.description: You've pasted aenv into a Slack, DM to unblock a teammate, and it's still sitting there. Secrets managers usually fix this with a whole platform: a CLI, accounts, sync engines, infra to run. justenv is lighter. A native Mac app that encrypts yourenv on-device and shares it with links that expire or burn after one open. No CLI. No account needed to receive. Keep prod, staging and preview separate. Free for solo devs.

posts.name: Voice Sync AI Teleprompter
posts.tagline: Voice-led teleprompter that follows your speech
posts.description: Voice Sync AI is a teleprompter that listens as you speak and scrolls word by word, so creators keep eye contact instead of racing a fixed timer. It supports camera recording, mirror mode for rigs, multi-device prompting, script imports, and offline languages for smoother solo or team video production.

posts.name: tabemasen
posts.tagline: Show your waiter what you can't eat in Japanese
posts.description: Traveling to Japan with food allergies, celiac disease, or halal/vegan needs? Tabemasen generates a polite, natural-sounding Japanese card you show to restaurant staff on your phone. It covers the things that catch travelers out - wheat in soy sauce, pork in dashi stock, mirin in glazes - and asks about cross-contamination in proper Japanese. Free, no signup, works offline once generated.

posts.name: Vavdio
posts.tagline: Don't know what to post? Start here.
posts.description: Most creators don't struggle with creating content. They struggle with knowing what to create. Vavdio helps creators discover profitable niches, analyze successful creators, uncover content patterns, and generate platform-specific ideas, hooks, scripts, captions, and hashtags. Instead of guessing what to post, creators get a clear path from research to published content in minutes.

posts.name: Scanniq
posts.tagline: Your pocket PDF scanner: OCR, tools & cloud sync
posts.description: Scanniq turns your iPhone into a pro document scanner — clean, fast, no sign-up needed. 📄 Scan receipts, contracts, IDs & whiteboards ✍️ Merge, split, password-protect & convert PDFs 🔍 OCR — pull editable text from any scan ☁️ Offline-first, cloud sync via Files app 🔒 Fill, sign & share documents instantly Free to start — 3 scans, no account needed. Pro: $4.99/mo · $29.99/yr. No watermarks.

posts.name: Zaplens
posts.tagline: Simulate real users and fix your UX 100x faster & cheaper
posts.description: Conventional A/B and CRO tools require heavy traffic to reach statistical significance, so most sites never conclude a test. Zaplens removes that dependency: 100+ synthetic AI personas traverse a URL toward a goal and return results 100x faster and cheaper. It surfaces UX bugs without treating your visitors as lab rats, with reasoning, so you know exactly what to fix. Before *any* your users see it. Choose personas from Zapstore or bring your own, but make sure you Zap it, before you launch it!

posts.name: Decagon AI
posts.tagline: The AI concierge that resolves enterprise support tickets.
posts.description: Decagon deploys autonomous AI agents for enterprise support across voice, chat, and email. Unlike scripted chatbots, our agents use natural language Agent Operating Procedures to reason through complex queries and execute real-world actions like refunds or account updates. We deliver concierge-level support that feels human. Build, test, and scale enterprise-grade agents without requiring a dedicated engineering sprint for every update.

posts.name: SproutBowl: AI Family Meal Tracker
posts.tagline: Privacy-first, AI-powered meal tracker for the whole family.
posts.description: Track your family’s nutrition in seconds. Snap a photo, and our on-device AI instantly categorizes meals into 9 essential groups. Perfect for toddler meals and allergy management. 100% private, no photos leave your device. Complete free & no limits.

posts.name: IngrediCheck Version 2
posts.tagline: Personalized packaged food analysis for your entire family.
posts.description: Scan barcodes or ingredient lists and see whether food fits allergies, diets, and family preferences, with plain-English ingredient explanations.

posts.name: BasePrice
posts.tagline: Localized pricing for App Store and Google Play in one click
posts.description: Most pricing tools stop at exchange rate or basic PPP. BasePrice gives you 6 strategies: World Bank PPP, Big Mac Index, Netflix Index, GDP-adjusted, exchange rate, or a custom blend. What no one else does: connect RevenueCat and see the estimated MRR impact of a price change before you publish. Drift Detection catches manual changes in either console. One click pushes to both App Store and Google Play. No SDK, no code changes.

posts.name: BatchGen Text with AI - v1.1.1
posts.tagline: No-subscription AI writing tool with more than model choice.
posts.description: Bulk generate blog drafts, social posts, product descriptions, essays, short stories, jokes, and personalised invitations, or any structured text, in batches on Windows. Bring your own AI key, choose your model, guide the tone with personas and samples, preview before the full run, and save every output locally. * No subscription, fully local and 'you-own-the-product' product. * All major AI providers and custom model supported. * 60+ languages, working examples bundled to start within minutes.

makers.name: 3thousand30
makers.headline: build for 3030 — not for next quarter

posts.name: Yupa
posts.tagline: Chat about a property or area before you buy
posts.description: Buying or renting somewhere to live is one of the biggest decisions most of us ever make. Yet we research it with 20 browser tabs, random forum posts, and gut feeling. The data exists. Crime, schools, prices, deprivation, flood risk, planning. All public, at least in the UK. Just buried in 40+ government datasets nobody reads. With Yupa, you can search any UK address or area and ask questions about it. AI agents fetch the data, you get a data-backed answer. Dashboards too if you prefer visual.

makers.name: Avin
makers.headline: Founder of Yupa-Your AI Property Advisor

posts.tagline: Localized pricing for App Store and Google Play in one click
posts.description: Most pricing tools stop at exchange rate or basic PPP. One click pushes to both App Store and Google Play. No SDK, no code changes.

posts.name: Confreres
posts.tagline: Personal CRM for job seekers and career-minded professionals
posts.description: Stop using messy spreadsheets. Confreres helps you track job opportunities and nurture your professional network all in one place. Visualize your application pipeline, set check-in reminders, track conversations, and request warm introductions from your extended network. Import LinkedIn and Google contacts, enrich profiles with Apollo, and stay connected through AI-powered outreach and smart email suggestions. Confreres helps you stay connected to the right people before you actually need them.

posts.name: Ringoza
posts.tagline: Instant click-to-call widget for websites
posts.description: Ringoza is a click-to-call widget that helps websites turn visitors into real phone conversations. Visitors enter their phone number, Ringoza calls them instantly, connects them with your team, and tracks call status, duration, and cost in the dashboard.

posts.name: QuitNicPouches
posts.tagline: Quit nicotine pouches with tapering and craving logs
posts.description: QuitNicPouches turns quitting Zyn, Velo, On!, Rogue, and other nicotine pouches into a daily plan. Set your baseline in minutes, choose tapering or cold turkey, log cravings and triggers, and track progress, savings, and recovery milestones. It is built for pouch habits, not cigarette streaks: pouch count, nicotine strength, routine triggers, and shame-free slip support.

posts.name: Free Online Resume Builder
posts.tagline: get hired by companies instantly
posts.description: Create a professional, ATS-optimized resume in minutes with Prism Resume Studio. Choose from a library of designer templates. 100% free forever, no registration required, and completely private. Let AI solve your queries. download your resume with 0 friction and edit multiple times. Edit your existing resumes too

posts.name: Flightdeck
posts.tagline: Operational finance for founders & complex finances
posts.description: Flightdeck is the operational finance dashboard for people whose finances don't fit neatly into "personal" or "business." Connect accounts, tag them as Personal, Business, or Both, and instantly understand your true cash position, net worth, runway, and financial health across everything you own and operate. We're launching with an interactive demo and early-access waitlist to gather feedback and shape what's next.

posts.name: pastel
posts.tagline: draw. guess. laugh
posts.description: pastel is a real-time multiplayer drawing and guessing game. open a room, share the link, draw with friends. voice chat baked in, so you can roast each other while you draw. bots that replay real human sketches from google's quick draw, no AI, just human doodles. reload mid-game and rejoin as the same player.

makers.name: Yashaswi Mishra
makers.headline: builds fast, real, and ridiculous things

posts.name: Linux Journey
posts.tagline: Learn Linux the Linux-fu way, for free.
posts.description: Linux Journey (linuxjourney.com) is one of the most popular free Linux learning platforms, now maintained by LabEx. Today we're launching the Linux Journey iOS app, making it easier to learn Linux anywhere. Explore beginner-friendly lessons, take interactive quizzes, track your progress, and build real Linux knowledge step by step. Free, open-source, and designed for anyone starting their Linux journey.

posts.name: XposterAI
posts.tagline: AI reply generator for X/Twitter
posts.description: Grow on X with AI replies in your own personal voice and a Persona Studio that learns how you write. Free to try — upgrade only when you want more.

posts.name: CalendarKit
posts.tagline: Your Mac's missing Google Calendar & Calculator in one click
posts.description: Switched from Windows to Mac and missed the taskbar calendar? Same here. 😤 CalendarKit fixes that — full Google Calendar + Calculator in one Chrome toolbar click. No app switching, no lost focus. 🗓️ Navigate any month instantly 🧮 Calculator with persistent history 🔒 Zero data collection 📦 Install: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/nhcbepdcigkmidijjchdfnngloaemfcn 🔗 GitHub: https://github.com/pSarveshKr/CalendarKit

posts.name: Langscroll — Turn Your Scroll Into Study
posts.tagline: Learn languages while scrolling
posts.description: Language immersion has always been the most natural way to learn, but it's been locked behind travel, expensive tutors, or awkward desktop setups. Langscroll makes immersion frictionless: real native speakers, real slang, real cultural context — layered directly onto the short-form video you're already scrolling. You're not carving out study time. You're absorbing a language the almost the same way you'd absorb it if you lived there.

posts.name: Thoth - Your Private AI Scribe
posts.tagline: Private AI meeting notes for your Mac. No cloud, ever.
posts.description: Since the last launch, Thoth shipped three major versions: New engines: Parakeet TDT v3 (batch + live, 25 languages, 90x batch speed), Parakeet EOU (live English, millisecond latency), and Apple Speech (live + batch, multilingual, near-EOU speed). All local. New AI: AI Chat on any recording, Apple Intelligence (no API key), Groq, and private server support (Ollama, LM Studio). New UX: Menu Bar mode, auto meeting detection for Zoom/Teams/Slack, French localization, sort recordings into folders.

makers.name: Matthieu V
makers.headline: Indie dev by night,Laser engineer by day

posts.tagline: Claude Code, fewer tool calls, faster coding.
posts.description: BeagleLathe is a local MCP server for Claude Code with eleven tools that collapse common 3–5 round-trips into a single call. Measured: ~10% cheaper, ~46% fewer tool calls, ~29% faster. Free for 200 calls/month. curl -LsSf https://beaglelathe.dev/install.sh | sh

posts.name: Promatic
posts.tagline: Boring permits. Real revenue.
posts.description: Promatic handles the boring permit work for HVAC and plumbing contractors, so jobs don’t get stuck in spreadsheets, inboxes, or forgotten follow-ups.

posts.name: RedReplier Square
posts.tagline: Reddit is a Times Square of the Internet, taken literally
posts.description: Walk through a crowded Times Square-inspired 3D scene filled with Reddit, X, Bluesky and Hacker News conversations from potential customers.

posts.name: Planamis
posts.tagline: Plan better hangouts with friends using AI (or not)
posts.description: Planamis keeps hangouts simple with shared spaces for plans, expenses, polls, notes, games, and chat with friends.

makers.name: Samuel Angel Gallo Ocampo
makers.headline: Founder. Building a global sky network.

posts.name: Humm - Share the Vibe
posts.tagline: Quantify the vibe.
posts.description: You went to a party, you loved the atmosphere, next day you want to share the moment on social media, describing the amazing experience, people might love the view but can't understand the "vibe" This is where my app comes in, simply put to quantify the vibe and give a shareable metric("party" score) based on all the ambient sounds around you, captured right in the moment. Similarly, if you want to share how good a place is for deep focus, you can share the "focus" score.

posts.name: Budget Manager
posts.tagline: Track expenses, subs, debts & goals — with AI inside.
posts.description: Butcem is the all-in-one personal finance app where your money actually lives — accounts, subscriptions, debts, savings goals, and even product warranties, all under one roof. A built-in AI runs 10 analyses (cash-flow forecast, subscription audit, debt strategy, financial health score) so you stop guessing where the money went. 12 interactive charts, one-tap PDF reports, offline-first sync, English & Turkish, multi-account & multi-currency from day one.

posts.name: Exit Bell
posts.tagline: A timer that plays a sound to get you out of any meeting
posts.description: Exit Bell sits in your macOS menubar. Before your next call, pick a timer (2, 5, or 10 min) and a sound - doorbell, dog bark, phone ring, or knock. Hit Arm. When the timer fires, the sound plays out loud on your call. You look up, say "sorry, I have to get that" and you're free. No subscriptions. No account. No App Store. Just a bell in your menubar. ⚠️ First launch: xattr -cr /Applications/ExitBell.app (Standard for any non-App Store Mac app)

posts.name: AnnoyMe
posts.tagline: A fox appears when you scroll too long. Can you ignore it?
posts.description: Most screen time apps block your apps. You just turn them off. AnnoyMe does something different. A fox appears on top of whatever you're scrolling and won't leave for 15 seconds. No blocking. No lectures. Just a fox that shows up and makes you aware. 5 escalating levels. 5 personalities — unbothered cat, chaotic goblin, coach bear, supportive penguin. Built by a solo dev from Uzbekistan. Free on Android.

makers.name: Nozim Ibrohimov

Just simple daily compounding. Pockets: Organise your cash for specific goals while keeping it entirely liquid.

posts.name: Tokenyst
posts.tagline: GitHub Copilot credit usage tracking for budget management
posts.description: Track your GitHub Copilot Chat usage, estimate token costs, and watch your spend against a monthly budget all from a VS Code sidebar and the status bar. Tokenyst is strictly local. It reads Copilot's own session files on your machine, estimates costs from a pricing table baked into the extension, and stores everything in a single JSON file under your home directory. Nothing is sent to any Tokenyst server.

posts.name: ContractHQ
posts.tagline: Catch every renewal. Spot every red flag.
posts.description: Auto-renewals creep up. Contracts pile up in inboxes. The one person who tracked them just left. ContractHQ uploads any PDF, Word doc, or vendor URL and extracts the dates, notice period, and renewal clauses in about 30 seconds. Then it runs a Red Flag Check that surfaces clauses departing from common SaaS practice across six categories: term, termination, usage rights, liability, indemnity, publicity. Forget about contracts. We email you before any notice deadline.

posts.name: ARCLINE

posts.name: Markbase

posts.description: Notion, but for Agents. As we use more than one AI product (Claude Code, Claude.ai chat and Claude Design as well as other products and models), we wanted these to be able to share their memory and context with each other. That's why we built Markbase

posts.name: OpenMerch
posts.tagline: Stop Buying Software. Start Buying Outcomes.
posts.description: Most software is sold as subscriptions, seats, and dashboards. OpenMerch flips the model. Instead of buying and managing tools, submit a job and get a result. Find verified business emails, enrich companies, research leads, and more through a single execution layer for humans, applications, and AI agents. No subscriptions. No vendor lock-in. Pay only when work completes. Software was built around tools. OpenMerch is built around outcomes.

Waitlist open.

posts.name: Exito
posts.tagline: Know WHY users drop off, not just where
posts.description: Your analytics shows WHERE users leave. Exito shows WHY. One script tag tracks rage clicks, scroll loops and exit intent. When users leave, a popup captures why. Claude AI cross-references behaviour vs feedback and generates a drop-off reason with confidence score. Every Monday, PM and sales get the same report automatically. The loop finally closes. Demo: getexito.com/demo

posts.name: Haze
posts.tagline: Focus music built with math, not AI
posts.description: Haze generates ambient music based on your real-time focus score, calculated from tab switches, typing speed, and time on site. No AI, no playlists, no streaming. Just pure Web Audio synthesis, oscillators and filters reacting to your behavior in real time. When you're deep in it the music slows down. When you drift it picks up. 14 soundscapes, all generative, always different. Free Chrome extension.

Free plan covers all ecosystems with full CVE detection. Pro ($19 one-time) adds cross-version compatibility analysis and risk-phased update planning.

posts.name: APIMaster.ai
posts.tagline: Detect fake LLM APIs & reveal the real model underneath
posts.description: The original idea was simple: I kept wondering – Is this LLM API I’m paying for actually real?? So I built something to answer that question. How does the detector work? I extracted 300+ stylistic features from each model (Opus 4.8 loves saying “genuinely”, “honestly”, and using “I” a lot, for example). Then built a classifier that can tell you what model is actually running behind the API. Based on 1k+ real user tests, 41% of LLM APIs out there are fake.
